Strategy Description: A strategy that captures the 'rebalancing premium' by going long a daily rebalanced crypto portfolio and shorting a buy-and-hold (drifting) portfolio.
Core Logic: Periodic rebalancing of volatile, uncorrelated assets forces selling of winners and buying of losers, earning a diversification return that buy-and-hold strategies miss.
Entry Conditions: Create two portfolios of 27 cryptos. Portfolio 1 is daily rebalanced to equal weights. Portfolio 2 is buy-and-hold (weights drift). Long Portfolio 1 and short Portfolio 2 with 70% weight.
Exit Conditions: Daily rebalancing of the long-short ratio.
Risk Management Rules: 70% short weight to mitigate crypto market volatility; uses Bitfinex for broad crypto coverage.
Long/Short Logic: Long rebalanced portfolio, short buy-and-hold portfolio.
Market Regime Suitability: Unknown; risks are lower than long-only crypto due to the short position.
Volatility Considerations: Estimated volatility is 2.62% (indicative); rebalancing significantly lowers variance.
Full Notes: The strategy relies on the proposition that no single asset consistently outperforms the others. BTG is often excluded due to data issues.
Mathematical/Statistical Concepts: Rebalancing premium, Diversification return, Variance reduction, Portfolio drift.
